positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of an astronaut traversing a stylized nebula formed by interconnected constellations and glowing abstract plant life. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, gold leaf accents, and soft cosmic lavender. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, suitable for a t-shirt chest print. Utilize pointillism and abstract linework textures, maintaining high contrast between the dark void and the luminous subject matter. Hyper-detailed, vector art quality, highly scalable, perfect for screen printing.
